description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a clean, rectangular silhouette and a minimalist design. The sofa is upholstered in a solid, light-colored fabric, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban environments. The backrest features vertical channeling, adding subtle texture and visual interest, while the seat consists of two large, uniform cushions. Both armrests are straight, at the same height as the backrest, and are thick and squared, providing a sturdy and comfortable boundary. The sofa stands on four short, tapered wooden legs, slightly angled outward, which elevate the piece and add a touch of warmth. The overall look is streamlined and functional, making it ideal for public spaces, lobbies, or modern residential settings.
description: A modern, light-colored three-seater sofa with vertical channeling on the backrest, squared armrests, and short tapered wooden legs. Its clean lines and minimalist design make it suitable for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, squared armrest and the full depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three-seater width, vertical channeling on the backrest, and the two large seat cushions.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with the squared armrest and visible seat depth.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous, slightly segmented backrest and the four wooden legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and a continuous backrest with vertical channeling; all cushions appear attached and evenly sized.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, squared armrests at the same height as the backrest, straight profile with no visible decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, tapered wooden legs positioned at the corners, slightly angled outward, with a simple exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with vertical channeling and attached cushioning, providing full support across the width.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with visible vertical channeling on the backrest, giving a subtle textured appearance; otherwise smooth and unpatterned.
